blocks.headline: Hero Block
blocks.subheadline: Full-width intro with optional background image, brand title, headline, subheadline, and multiple call-to-action buttons. Ideal for landing pages, campaign headers, and above-the-fold storytelling.

backgroundImage.alt: Colourful hot air balloons — sample hero background

blocks.title: Built for client demos
blocks.body:
This site is a living component library. Each section below maps to a CMS block your team can mix, reorder, and publish without touching code.

Scroll through Content, Media, and Contact to preview every block type included in the template — then swap copy, imagery, and video for your next project.

blocks.title: What's included
blocks.body:
8 composable blocks — Hero, About, Text, Gallery, Video, Video Carousel, CTA, and Contact.

2 CMS modes — local mock JSON for fast iteration, or Sanity for shared authoring and production deploys.

Environment-aware — single-page or multi-route navigation, GitHub Pages static export, and hosted Sanity Studio.

Fork this template for your next client site, replace the demo copy, and ship.

blocks.title: Content blocks
blocks.body: These blocks handle narrative and profile content — perfect for about pages, service descriptions, and editorial sections.

blocks.title: About Block
blocks.body: Side-by-side layout with title, body copy, optional portrait or team photo, and a row of stat highlights. Use it for studio bios, founder stories, or capability summaries.

image.alt: Sample portrait for the About block

blocks.title: Text Block
blocks.body:
Flexible rich-text section for long-form copy, lists, and inline formatting. Authors write in the CMS; the front end renders semantic HTML.

  • Section titles and body copy
  • Supports paragraphs, emphasis, and lists
  • Stacks cleanly between visual blocks

Pair it with Hero, About, or Contact blocks to build complete pages from structured content alone.

blocks.title: Media blocks
blocks.body: Image grids, hosted video, embeds, and carousels — everything you need for portfolios, case studies, and motion reels.

items.alt: Gallery image — selectable grid tile with hover state
Gallery image — case study or project thumbnail
Gallery video — inline MP4 from Sanity CDN or hosted URL

blocks.title: Video Block — embed or hosted
blocks.body: The Video block supports YouTube/Vimeo embeds (shown above) or a hosted MP4 URL from Sanity CDN. Authors pick one source in the CMS; the site renders the appropriate player.

blocks.title: Video Carousel Block — swipeable reel
blocks.body: Horizontal carousel for motion reels, product demos, or testimonial clips. Each slide supports a hosted MP4, optional poster image, and title.

blocks.title: CTA Block
blocks.body: Standalone call-to-action button for conversion moments — book a call, view pricing, or download a deck. Place it anywhere in the page flow.

blocks.title: Contact Block
blocks.subtitle: Contact form with email, phone, location, and social links. Wire the submit action to your CRM or email service in a derived project — the layout and fields are ready out of the box.
